message:
Close bead jeffreysprompts.com-1a3: suggest command with --semantic flag

The jfp suggest command now supports:
- BM25 search for fast keyword matching
- --semantic flag for embedding-based reranking
- Falls back to hash embeddings when MiniLM model unavailable
- Default limit of 3 suggestions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
